headings: UNCONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON PROGRESS PAYMENT
text: The undersigned being duly sworn, states that (s)he is an authorized agent for ('Supplier'). Pursuant to its Supply Agreement with ('Subcontractor'), a subcontractor to GS Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor'), and in consideration of the sum of $ ,  supplier hereby waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished through (the 'Release Date') to ('Subcontractor') for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') owned by GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC ('Owner') being constructed on the following real property (the 'Property'):
